    strfmon: Remove XXX marks

    phantom@'s HDD crashed with the final version of strfmon.c, as explained
    in 9d430a5991d3f64a75fee951a1efab3593207832.

    Now there are tests in place that cover these code paths.

    Reviewed by:    kib
    PR:     267410
    Github PR:      #620
    MFC after:      1 week
